title: Minor fix for lighttpd example script in README

comments.body: Bot is ignoring me, going to close and reopen this to force the tests.
Can we get CI re-run again? I will follow up closing the issue after the merge.

@pixdrift Could you close the PR and reopen to see if it will retest, or you could

git commit -a --amend -s
Save it
git push --force

And it should retrigger. Not sure why the bot will not retest.
@rhatdan, no drama. Will sort it out in the morning.
